title: Baton Design Allowlist
description: Per-slice escape hatch for design conformance violations. Patterns listed here are suppressed from the audit.

pattern.description: Pattern to suppress. For colour checks: hex value or file:line. For architecture checks: file path or rule-id:file.

reason.description: Why this violation is accepted. Must include justification per Rule 2.

acknowledged_by.description: Who acknowledged this deferral (human or captain identifier)
